skills: AI productivity education and content packaging
assets: access to a large pool of AI-curious users for surveys and pilots
distribution: strong reach to students, job-seekers, and hobbyists
weak trusted reach to business buyers
network_access: non-buyer audience that can be recruited into assessments, cohorts, and benchmark studies
constraints: does not want a course-revenue business
does not currently have trust with business buyers
credibility_signals: large real audience in a hot category
visible resonance around AI productivity topics
unfair_advantages: can recruit benchmark participants faster than a typical founder
can generate proprietary user behavior and workflow data from the existing audience

opportunities.title: Paid AI workflow benchmark membership for ambitious individuals
opportunities.thesis: Sell a recurring membership that gives users benchmark tests, workflow scorecards, and recurring improvement reports.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: The current audience already wants progress and comparison. The founder has distribution to this segment even without business-buyer trust.
validation_plan: Launch a narrow benchmark promise to one audience slice
Collect 200-500 responses
Test low-ticket founding memberships or deposits
kill_criteria: Strong engagement but no paid conversion

opportunities.title: AI tool and workflow intelligence subscription for serious operators
opportunities.thesis: Offer a paid research subscription with practical tool comparisons and implementation notes.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: Existing reach helps recruit testers and surface patterns, but the moat is limited until the data becomes proprietary.
validation_plan: Publish one free benchmark-style report
Offer a paid monthly intelligence subscription
Interview early subscribers on repeat-value drivers
kill_criteria: Content is interesting but not decision-grade

opportunities.title: AI productivity benchmark dataset for teams
opportunities.thesis: Build the canonical dataset linking roles, workflows, and AI usage habits to measurable productivity outcomes.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: The audience gives fast access to a participant pool that can become a proprietary benchmark asset.
validation_plan: Collect longitudinal benchmark data from repeated cohorts
Publish methodology and sample-size notes
Test interest with L&D and enablement buyers once strong insights exist
kill_criteria: Data is too noisy or generic
No differentiated insight after several cohorts
Business buyers show no interest in benchmark outputs

opportunities.title: AI workflow assessment and certification platform
opportunities.thesis: Create role-specific assessments that verify practical AI workflow ability and package the signal for employers and partners.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: The founder has supply-side access to test-takers, but demand-side trust with employers has to be built through rigor and outcomes.
validation_plan: Pilot one assessment module
Track user performance and perceived value
Test partner interest with training providers or recruiting operators
kill_criteria: Users do not value the credential
Assessment validity is hard to defend

opportunities.title: Benchmark lab to proprietary dataset to team readiness SaaS
opportunities.thesis: Start with a recurring benchmark lab for individuals, turn the resulting data into public research and a benchmark dataset, then build a buyer-grade readiness product for teams.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: This path uses the existing audience as a participant and data engine instead of pretending it is already a trusted buyer channel.
validation_plan: Launch one narrow benchmark to a single audience slice
Convert early participants into paid founding members or deposit holders
Publish a sharp insight report from the first cohort
Track whether repeated cohorts create a visibly stronger dataset
kill_criteria: Fewer than 5 paid users or fewer than 20 deposits after a serious launch
No differentiated insight from the first 200-500 responses
Benchmark content fails to improve buyer trust signals after 4-6 weeks

opportunities.title: Research media to benchmark reports to B2B intelligence subscription
opportunities.thesis: Run recurring field studies on AI productivity, publish benchmark reports, and convert them into a paid intelligence subscription for team leaders and vendors.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: Public research can create buyer trust without services, and the existing audience can supply respondents and early distribution.
validation_plan: Run a first field study
Publish a public report
Offer a paid premium version or subscription
Measure whether buyers consume and share it
kill_criteria: Reports get attention but no paid demand

next_actions: Pick one narrow audience slice instead of addressing the full follower base
Define a single benchmark promise and assessment
Launch a paid founding membership or deposit-backed waitlist within 7 days
Use the first cohort to generate a public insight report
Judge the opportunity on paid signal, completion rate, and data quality rather than engagement metrics
